ccel.title: NPNF1-03. On the Holy Trinity; Doctrinal Treatises; Moral Treatises

source.title: NPNF1-03. On the Holy Trinity; Doctrinal Treatises; Moral Treatises
NPNF1-03. On the Holy Trinity; Doctrinal Treatises; Moral Treatises

verses.text: We believe also “the resurrection of the flesh,” which went before in Christ: that the body too may have hope of that which went before in its Head.
The Head of the Church, Christ: the Church, the body of Christ.
Our Head is risen, ascended into heaven: where the Head, there also the members.
In what way the resurrection of the flesh?
Lest any should chance to think it like as Lazarus’s resurrection, that thou mayest know it to be not so, it is added, “Into life everlasting.”
God bring you safe unto Himself, Who is the Life Everlasting.
